Target elements by an arbitrary CSS selector

Source: R/targets.R
anime_target_css.Rd

A pass-through for selectors not covered by the other anime_target_*() helpers.

Usage

anime_target_css(selector)

Arguments

selector

Character scalar. A valid CSS selector string.

Value

selector unchanged.

Examples

anime_target_css(".panel > circle")
#> [1] ".panel > circle"

On this page
